text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer. I'm reeeal sleepy today.
choice_data_list: What did you do on your day off yesterday?
What did you do on your day off yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We had a party over in the dorm! It was awful
fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ol' Hishiama turned in early, so we kicked off our
boots and threw a real hootenanny!
choice_data_list: So basically... you had a good time?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! Hishiama really let us have it when
she woke up though. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It sounds like Taiki Shuttle didn't get much sleep.
